creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text: I was informed by the upstream maintainer that this change is not binary-compatible -- the constness is encoded in the symbol name -- so upstream is going to add a const operator< alongside. So a next release (1.5.1) can drop this patch again, but there's some small risk to software built against 1.5.0 and not re-build against 1.5.0_1. I don't think that's *really* much of an issue in our ports and packages though.
